sources.snapshot_or_version: Git commit to be pinned at acquisition approval

sources.attribution_requirements: Document title, source URL, Mozilla Contributors, license, and modification notice.

sources.snapshot_or_version: Dated publication manifest required

sources.official_source_name: EUR-Lex reusable legal documents and editorial text
sources.snapshot_or_version: 2026-07-22 dated manifest
sources.license: Commission Decision 2011/833/EU reuse policy; EU-owned editorial content CC BY 4.0; metadata CC0
sources.redistribution_conditions: Exclude documents with special conditions, third-party rights, identifiable-person material, logos, and industrial-property content.
sources.attribution_requirements: Acknowledge European Union source and indicate modifications.
sources.relationship_to_corpus_v3: new institutional English structured prose; deduplicate against EU parallel sources

sources.official_source_name: European Commission DGT-Acquis Turkish-English aligned subset

sources.license: European Commission document reuse policy, subject to source conditions
sources.redistribution_conditions: Confirm Turkish-English release coverage and current conditions; deduplicate EUR-Lex/DGT overlap by document identifier.
sources.attribution_requirements: European Commission/JRC resource citation and source document identifiers.
sources.relationship_to_corpus_v3: new controlled bilingual material; high overlap risk with other EU sources

sources.snapshot_or_version: Journal and article license manifest dated 2026-07-22
sources.license: Mixed by journal and article; admit only explicit CC BY or other approved commercial-reuse licenses
sources.redistribution_conditions: Open access alone is insufficient; reject NC, ND, missing, inconsistent, or changed licenses unless separately approved.
sources.attribution_requirements: Per-article author, title, journal, DOI, source URL, license, and snapshot.
sources.relationship_to_corpus_v3: high-value new Turkish prose with no blanket platform license

sources.snapshot_or_version: Per-work rights manifest and download date required

sources.redistribution_conditions: Perform per-work Turkish-jurisdiction review; strip Project Gutenberg boilerplate only with compliant redistribution handling.
sources.attribution_requirements: Author, title, ebook identifier, source, public-domain determination, and retrieval date.
sources.relationship_to_corpus_v3: new Turkish book prose; limited capacity and jurisdiction review required

sources.snapshot_or_version: Dated OA file list restricted to CC0, CC BY, and CC BY-SA text

sources.redistribution_conditions: Use only approved PMC bulk services; enforce article-level licenses and exclude third-party media and retracted/removed rights records.
sources.attribution_requirements: PMCID, citation, authors, article license, source URL, and retrieval snapshot.

sources.official_source_name: OpenStax legacy CC BY textbook editions

sources.redistribution_conditions: Pin exact legacy edition files and embedded licenses; exclude NC-SA updates and trademarked cover material.
